hint.chinese_simplified: 通过计算平均数来凑出 24
hint.chinese_traditional: 通過計算平均數來湊出 24

hint.english: Similar to taking a mean to make 24
hint.chinese_simplified: 思路同样是利用平均数来凑出 24
hint.chinese_traditional: 思路同樣是利用平均數來湊出 24

hint.chinese_simplified: 利用几何平均数来计算
hint.chinese_traditional: 利用幾何平均數來計算

hint.english: Adding two fractions with the same denominator can be rewritten as one fraction. This avoids rewriting denominators.
hint.chinese_simplified: 两个同分母分数相加可以合并为一个分数，这样就不用重复写分母了。
hint.chinese_traditional: 兩個同分母分數相加可以合併為一個分數，這樣就不用重複寫分母了。

hint.english: First, do 5-2-1 = 2. You can get rid of stuff by making them 1s. Or you could just make 0
hint.chinese_simplified: 先计算 5-2-1 = 2。你可以把多余的卡片变成 1 来消掉，或者直接把它们变成 0
hint.chinese_traditional: 先計算 5-2-1 = 2。你可以把多餘的卡片變成 1 來消掉，或者直接把它們變成 0
